description: Fragment of a legal deed. Involving Muḥsin and Ṣedaqa. Written and signed by Efrayim b. Shemarya (dated documents: 1007-1055 CE), head of the Palestinian congregation and court of law. Also signed by four others: Aharon b. David ha-Levi; Shemarya b. Moshe; Shelomo b. Ḥakīm; Yefet b. Ṭoviyya ha-Levi. Dated to the middle of the 11th century. On the back of a reused Fatimid decree (two fragmentary lines preserved).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
